$comment: scripts/openapi/check_drift.py fails CI on any breaking change to
packages/openapi-client/openapi.json whose signature is not listed here.
Add an entry only when the break is intentional AND existing callers have a
migration. Each entry must name the task that approved it and what a caller
must do; 'signature' is copied verbatim from the check_drift.py failure.
An entry is a permanent record, not a mute button: once the affected
release has shipped and no caller remains on the old contract, delete it.
